languages.text: "Значит, снова за работу. Все помнят, у кого какой станок?"
"So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"
languages.original_text: "Значит, снова за работу. Все помнят, у кого какой станок?"

traits.locale_text: "So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"
"So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"
"So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"

languages.text: “好了，又该干活了。都还记得自己负责哪台机器吧？”
languages.original_text: "So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"

traits.locale_text: “好了，又该干活了。都还记得自己负责哪台机器吧？”

languages.text: «De vuelta al trabajo, entonces. ¿Os acordáis todos de en qué máquina estabais?».
languages.original_text: "So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"

traits.locale_text: «De vuelta al trabajo, entonces. ¿Os acordáis todos de en qué máquina estabais?».

languages.text: « Bon, on se remet au travail. Tout le monde se rappelle à quelle machine il est assigné ? »
languages.original_text: "So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"

traits.locale_text: « Bon, on se remet au travail. Tout le monde se rappelle à quelle machine il est assigné ? »

languages.text: "Evet, yeniden iş başına. Herkes hangi makinede olduğunu hatırlıyor mu?"
languages.original_text: "So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"

traits.locale_text: "Evet, yeniden iş başına. Herkes hangi makinede olduğunu hatırlıyor mu?"

languages.text: "Also zurück an die Arbeit. Wissen noch alle, zu welchen Maschinen sie müssen?"
languages.original_text: "So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"

traits.locale_text: "Also zurück an die Arbeit. Wissen noch alle, zu welchen Maschinen sie müssen?"

languages.text: 「それでは、また仕事に戻ります。どの機械で働いているか、覚えていますか？」
languages.original_text: "So, back to work again. Do you all remember which machine you're at?"

traits.locale_text: 「それでは、また仕事に戻ります。どの機械で働いているか、覚えていますか？」
